_comment: 2026-06-30: serena + cratesio + rust-analyzer-mcp ENABLED per owner. NOTE these load at NEXT session start. serena and rust-analyzer-mcp index this 35-crate wgpu workspace, so the FIRST use each session may stall while they index — if a sub-agent blocks for minutes, that's the warmup; let it finish once. rust-docs is left DISABLED on purpose: it shells out to `cargo doc`/`cargo test --doc`, which caused a 52-minute runaway agent. rust-mcp-server: failed to compile on Rust 1.96 and is redundant with rust-analyzer-mcp; re-attempt with --locked in progress. Move a server between 'mcpServers' and '_disabledMcpServers' to toggle. If indexing stalls keep biting, set checkOnSave off / limit scope via a rust-analyzer.toml, or split the workspace.
